sense.definition: a straight, flat tool typically made of wood, plastic, or metal, used for measuring and drawing straight lines

examples.x: The student used a ruler to draw precise lines on the graph paper.
He measured the length of the board using a ruler before cutting it.
The tailor used a ruler to ensure accurate measurements for sewing the garment.
She marked the intervals on the ruler to create a scale for the map.
The carpenter carried a steel ruler in his toolbox for accurate measurements on the job site.

sense.definition: a measuring tool equipped with markings and features designed to locate the center point of an object or distance quickly and accurately

examples.x: The mathematics teacher demonstrated how to use a center finding ruler to help students understand geometric concepts by locating the center of various shapes accurately.
The carpenter relied on his center finding ruler to mark the midpoint of each board accurately before cutting them to size for the project.
The architect used a center finding ruler to ensure that the columns in the blueprint were evenly spaced and aligned with precision.
During the drafting process, the engineer employed a center finding ruler to locate the exact center of the blueprint for the placement of critical components.
The artist found the center finding ruler indispensable for dividing the canvas into equal sections to create a balanced composition.

sense.definition: a tool for drafting and technical drawing with multiple scales along three edges, facilitating accurate measurements and scaling of drawings

examples.x: The architect used a triangular scale to accurately resize the floor plan, ensuring all measurements were in proportion before presenting it to the client.
In the engineering lab, students relied on triangular scales to convert measurements from a blueprint into a scaled model for their project.
During the drafting workshop, participants learned how to use a triangular scale to represent various dimensions on architectural drawings with precision.
The graphic designer utilized a triangular scale to resize images and graphics proportionally while creating a layout for the magazine.
In the cartography class, students employed triangular scales to map out geographical features, ensuring accurate representation of distances and elevations.

sense.definition: a geometric instrument consisting of three straight sides and three angles, commonly used to draw or measure angles and straight lines accurately

examples.x: She relied on a transparent triangle ruler to draw precise lines for the blueprint.
The geometry teacher demonstrated how to use a protractor and triangle to measure angles in the classroom.
The engineer utilized a steel triangle ruler to construct the framework for the bridge with precision.

sense.definition: a measuring and marking tool with a straight edge and a perpendicular arm, typically made of steel, used in carpentry and construction for checking right angles and laying out accurate measurements

examples.x: The carpenter used a steel square to ensure the corners of the frame were perfectly aligned.
Before cutting the wood, he marked a straight line using the steel square for accuracy.
The builder double-checked the roof angles with a steel square to avoid mistakes.
She used a steel square to measure the dimensions of the plywood sheet precisely.
The apprentice learned how to mark right angles on lumber using the steel square.

sense.definition: a straightedge tool with a perpendicular crosspiece used in conjunction with a drafting board for drawing straight lines and right angles

examples.x: He placed the T-square along the edge of the drafting board to ensure the lines were level.

sense.definition: a tool used in carpentry for measuring and marking right angles and straight lines
a measuring tool made of bendable material, such as plastic or rubber, allowing it to conform to curved surfaces for measuring irregular shapes or objects

examples.x: The fashion designer used a flexible ruler to measure the curves of the mannequin accurately while drafting patterns for the new collection.
During the art class, students employed flexible rulers to trace the contours of organic shapes in their still-life drawings.
In the sewing workshop, participants utilized flexible rulers to take precise measurements around the body for custom-fitted garments.
The engineer relied on a flexible ruler to measure the contours of the terrain accurately before designing the road layout.
When creating a mosaic, the artist used a flexible ruler to measure and cut the tiles to fit seamlessly into the curved surface of the sculpture.

sense.definition: a measuring tool consisting of multiple segments hinged together, allowing it to fold for convenient storage and unfold to various lengths for measuring objects or distances

examples.x: The carpenter unfolded his folding ruler to measure the length of the wooden plank before cutting it to size.
During the home renovation project, the handyman used a folding ruler to take precise measurements of the room's dimensions.
In the classroom, the teacher demonstrated how to use a folding ruler to measure various objects as part of a math lesson.
The DIY enthusiast kept a folding ruler in their toolbox for quick and accurate measurements during household repairs.
When designing the layout for the garden, the landscaper relied on a folding ruler to ensure equal spacing between the plants.

sense.definition: a measuring tool with electronic sensors or technology that provides accurate length or distance measurements through a digital display

examples.x: The architect used a digital ruler to quickly measure the dimensions of the room before creating the blueprint.
During the science experiment, the students utilized a digital ruler to accurately record the length of each sample.
In the workshop, the craftsman relied on a digital ruler to ensure precise cuts for the custom furniture project.
The tailor employed a digital ruler to take measurements for the bespoke suit, ensuring a perfect fit for the client.
When working on the engineering project, the team used a digital ruler to verify the dimensions of the prototype components.

sense.definition: a measurement device that uses laser technology to accurately determine distance or dimensions in a single beam

examples.x: The surveyor relied on a laser ruler to measure the precise distance between the two points on the construction site.
During the home renovation project, the contractor used a laser ruler to ensure the shelves were mounted evenly along the wall.
In the laboratory, scientists utilized a laser ruler to measure the diameter of microscopic particles with high precision.
The interior designer employed a laser ruler to calculate the dimensions of the room accurately before selecting furniture.
When setting up the exhibition, the curator used a laser ruler to align the artworks perfectly along the gallery walls.

sense.definition: a measuring tool with a grid pattern etched onto its surface, facilitating precise measurement and alignment of objects or distances according to the grid lines

examples.x: The graphic designer used a grid ruler to ensure consistent spacing and alignment of elements in the layout design.
During the craft project, the artist relied on a grid ruler to accurately divide the canvas into sections for painting.
In the math class, students utilized a grid ruler to measure geometric shapes and calculate area with precision.
The urban planner used a grid ruler to create scaled maps, accurately representing the layout of the city streets and buildings.
When sketching the architectural blueprint, the draftsman employed a grid ruler to align the floor plan elements and maintain proportional scale.

sense.definition: a measuring instrument used to measure and draw angles

examples.x: The teacher used a protractor to show how to measure angles in the geometry lesson.
To build the frame correctly, the carpenter needed a protractor to check the angle between the two beams.
The protractor helped the student draw precise angles for the math assignment.
Before cutting the wood, the contractor used a protractor to ensure the angle was exactly 45 degrees.
The engineer used a protractor to measure the angle of the roof in the blueprint.

sense.definition: (usually plural) a measuring tool with two jaws used to measure the distance between them or the dimensions of an object

examples.x: The machinist used a caliper to measure the diameter of the metal rod.
Calipers are commonly used in woodworking to take accurate measurements for precise cuts.
The jeweler relied on calipers to measure the diameter of gemstones for setting into jewelry.

sense.definition: a flexible curved ruler used for drawing smooth curves and irregular shapes
a tool for creating uniform and consistent lettering by guiding the placement of letters at precise intervals on a page

examples.x: The graphic designer used a lettering guide to ensure uniformity in the spacing and size of text elements in the advertisement layout.
During the calligraphy workshop, participants utilized a lettering guide to maintain consistent letter heights and spacing in their handwritten pieces.
In the architectural drawing class, students relied on a lettering guide to add professional-looking text labels to their floor plans and elevations.
The sign maker employed a lettering guide to create neat and legible signage for the storefront, ensuring uniformity in letter size and spacing.
When addressing envelopes for the wedding invitations, the bride used a lettering guide to achieve elegant and consistent handwriting on each envelope.

sense.definition: a tool used for drawing circles and arcs of various sizes
a drafting tool used for drawing precise circles and arcs, consisting of a beam with adjustable attachments at each end

examples.x: The architect used a beam compass to draw the large circular floor plan for the auditorium.
During the engineering project, the student utilized a beam compass to sketch precise arcs for the bridge design.
In the art studio, the painter employed a beam compass to outline the curvature of the vase before applying brush strokes.
The carpenter relied on a beam compass to mark the radius for cutting curved trim pieces for the furniture project.
When creating the mandala artwork, the artist used a beam compass to draw intricate concentric circles with perfect symmetry.
